suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update core-api-worker to include an explicit verification-only branch for already-completed features so workers can validate landed commits without marking the procedure as deviated.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The canonical-chain-resolution-expansion review found the worker had to report a procedure deviation solely because the feature was already implemented in commit 25024d6 and only required verification; mission AGENTS.md already allows verification-only handoffs.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Strengthen core-api-worker guidance to require checking existing endpoint behavior and task prompts before escalating blocking findings on adjacent milestone requirements.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The cross-alias-contract-resolution reviews showed an earlier worker incorrectly escalated `/diagnostics/chain_coverage` confidence as missing even though the field already existed and the feature prompt explicitly said not to report it as missing.
